prestazioni: 3UZ-FE 4.3L V8 engine forced induction via Garrett GT4202R turbocharger (850hp capable with forged internals), paired with a custom Tomei 2.2L titanium exhaust manifold and HKS GT-SS wastegate for precise boost control (targeting 18-20 psi on E85 fuel).

Full Tomei Powered Enterprise stroker kit (4.6L displacement) with forged Mahle pistons (9.0:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft, mated to a Kelford 224-B camshaft set (intake/exhaust lift: 11.0mm/10.8mm, duration: 280°/276°).

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with dual Bosch 0280158861 1000cc injectors (E85-compatible), AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors, and a custom 3.5-inch intercooler piping system with a PWR 4-core front-mount intercooler (capable of -50°F intake temps at 20 psi).
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap and gloss black accents on the lower cladding.

Seibon Carbon fiber hardtop replacement with integrated LED halo lighting (Lux H8 V4 bulbs) and a custom rear spoiler from Rocket Bunny (Pandem SC430-specific design, 3-piece carbon fiber construction).

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (20x10 +15 front, 20x12 +25 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30/20 front, 315/25/20 rear), paired with D2 Racing coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, and 20-way compression) and Cusco front/rear strut bars.
